## What problem does this solve?

Describe the situation or friction you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see in the app?

## Alternatives you've considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Does this fit the Ixercise philosophy?

Ixercise is offline-first, account-free, and focused on executing your own workout routines.
Briefly explain why this feature fits that direction (or why it's worth reconsidering it).

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or any other context.
